title: CobbleKingdoms
description: The definitive Cobblemon pack: every Pokémon, every Mega, Z-Moves, backpacks, and tons more — tuned for performance.
body:
# 🏰 CobbleKingdoms — The Ultimate Cobblemon Modpack

**Build your team. Challenge the gyms. Claim your throne.**

CobbleKingdoms is the official modpack for the CobbleKingdoms server — a handcrafted Cobblemon experience that's been optimized from the ground up for performance, quality of life, and seamless multiplayer. Whether you're a seasoned trainer or just starting out, everything is pre-configured and ready to go from the moment you hit play.

> ⚠️ **IMPORTANT:** Allocate **4–6 GB of RAM** in your launcher settings to prevent crashes and ensure smooth gameplay.

---

## ⚡ Performance First

We know nothing kills the vibe faster than lag. That's why performance was our #1 priority when building this pack. Every optimization mod has been carefully selected and tested to give you the smoothest possible experience — even on lower-end hardware.

- **Sodium** — Industry-standard rendering engine replacement for massive FPS gains
- **Immediately Fast** — Speeds up entity rendering and reduces GPU overhead
- **Entity Culling** — Stops the game from rendering entities you can't even see
- **Clumps** — Merges XP orbs together to reduce entity lag

The result? Buttery smooth chunk loading, minimal frame drops, and a game that actually runs the way it should.

---

## 🗺️ Built-In Minimap

Never lose your way again. CobbleKingdoms ships with a fully integrated minimap system so you can explore with confidence, mark key locations, and navigate the world like a pro.

- **Xaero's Minimap** — A clean, customizable minimap right on your HUD
- **Xaero's World Map** — Full-screen world map with waypoints, player tracking, and more

Both come pre-configured with optimized settings out of the box.

---

## ✨ Quality-of-Life Enhancements

Every mod in this pack earns its spot. We've hand-picked a set of QoL improvements that make your Cobblemon journey smoother and more enjoyable — without bloating your game or adding unnecessary complexity.

- **Ambient Environment** — Subtle environmental enhancements that make the entire world feel alive
- **Better Advancements** — A complete overhaul of the advancement UI, making progression clear and satisfying
- **Better Third Person & Not Enough Animations** — Gorgeous third-person animations and polished player movement
- **InvMove** — Move freely while browsing your inventory, crafting, or interacting with any GUI
- **Fresh Animations** — Dynamic, lively animations for all vanilla mobs
- **Cobblemon Interface** — A Pokémon-inspired GUI overhaul that ties the whole experience together

---

## 🎮 The CobbleKingdoms Server Experience

CobbleKingdoms isn't just a modpack — it's your gateway to an incredible multiplayer Pokémon adventure. The CobbleKingdoms server is where it all comes together:

🏆 **Gym Leaders & Elite Four** — Challenge formidable trainers across multiple regions and prove your worth on the path to becoming Champion

🗼 **Battle Tower** — Conquer our unique multi-stage tower to push your team's endurance to the limit and earn exclusive rewards

💰 **Competitive Tournaments** — Enter high-stakes competitions for incredible loot and real prize money

🎨 **Custom Content** — Exclusive custom Pokémon reskins, unique structures, and server-original features you won't find anywhere else

👥 **Active Community** — Join a friendly, welcoming community of trainers ready to battle, trade, and explore together

🌍 **Rich World** — Explore a massive, handcrafted world filled with gyms, dungeons, legendary encounters, and secrets waiting to be discovered

---

## 📦 What's Included

- ✅ Latest version of **Cobblemon**
- ✅ Performance optimization mods for smooth gameplay on any hardware
- ✅ Integrated minimap with full waypoint functionality
- ✅ Quality-of-life and UI improvements
- ✅ Custom resource packs and soundtrack
- ✅ Pre-configured settings — no setup needed, just install and play
- ✅ Seamless CobbleKingdoms server integration

---

## 🔧 Compatibility

| | |
|---|---|
| **Minecraft Version** | 1.21.1 |
| **Mod Loader** | Fabric |
| **Recommended RAM** | 4–6 GB |
| **Cobblemon Version** | Latest |

---

## 🚀 Get Started

1. Download and install the modpack through Modrinth
2. Set your RAM allocation to **4–6 GB** in launcher settings
3. Launch the game and connect to the CobbleKingdoms server
4. Begin your journey to become Champion!

---

**Start your legendary Cobblemon journey today and claim your throne on CobbleKingdoms!**
